overall.description: A cinematic cutscene from a wizarding video game showing characters in robes conversing on a grassy field before a historic castle adorned with red and gold banners. The static camera captures a dialogue interaction between students near the castle walls while others converse in the background.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a grassy field before a historic castle wall decorated with red and gold banners. A student holding a broomstick converses with two peers in the foreground, while another group of three students talks separately on the left. The camera remains fixed, capturing the dialogue and subtle gestures of the characters against the backdrop of stone towers and distant spires under a partly cloudy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze across a vibrant grassy field set against the imposing backdrop of a historic castle. It begins by framing a student with a broomstick engaged in conversation with two peers in the foreground, while another small group of students talks nearby to the left. The camera remains fixed as it captures the subtle gestures and dialogue of the characters, grounding the interaction within the expansive courtyard. The scene concludes with the stone towers and distant spires standing tall under a partly cloudy sky, emphasizing the scale of the architecture relative to the students.
